introSection: Mecalodon is a steel launched roller coaster currently located at Walibi Belgium in Wavre, Walloon Brabant, Wallonia, Belgium. It is built by Gerstlauer.
fullText: Mecalodon is a steel launched roller coaster currently located at Walibi Belgium in Wavre, Walloon Brabant, Wallonia, Belgium. It is built by Gerstlauer.
